tabs.content:
.create materialized-view with (backfill=true) streaming_summary on table streaming_events
{
    streaming_events
    | summarize 
        stream_count = countif(event_type == "stream"),
        total_events = count(),
        avg_duration_sec = avg(stream_duration_sec),
        last_event = max(event_timestamp)
        by track_id, track_name, artist_name, region
}
tabs.title: Tab
